The '''Versafunction88''' was a [[Datapad/Legends|datapad]] manufactured by [[MicroData Technologies/Legends|MicroData Technologies]] prior to the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]]. It was capable of linking with other computer systems, featured a touch-sensitive screen, and also had a data port, [[Holoprojector/Legends|holoprojector]], recorder, and handgrips.

An example of this datapad was seen at the [[Boonta Eve Classic/Legends|Boonta Eve Classic]] podrace, where fans used their Versafunction88s to view the progress of the racers by linking to video feeds from various cameras and [[Podrace balloon|recording balloons]] around the track.<ref name="NEGWT" />

{{Tech-stub}}
